name: rolepod
description: Coordinated software-house team for AI coding CLIs — 16 specialist agents, Core 10 phase skills (1 router + 9 phase), 6-phase lifecycle. Pre-commit gates (S1-S5 simplicity / T1-T6 testing / F1-F5 failure-mode) catch bugs before ship. On Cursor, the always-on judgment core is delivered by an alwaysApply rule (rules/always-on-core.mdc); agents/skills/hooks load via Cursor's native plugin loader. See https://github.com/nuttaruj/rolepod.
